series_metadata.series_description: Continuing education forms show the basis of continuing education credits for maintaining license. May also include certificates of completion, correspondence, tracking forms or transcripts. All license types issued by agency pursuant to ORC Section 4779.09, including Orthotist, Prosthetist, Prosthetist-Orthotist, and Pedorthist.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five years from submission approval
